query:
CREATE TABLE `kanban_columns` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`color` varchar(32) DEFAULT '#378add',
	`position` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	CONSTRAINT `kanban_columns_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

	CONSTRAINT `kanban_columns_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
